rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §33.9011, which governs prohibited food additives in school meals. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 33.9011. PROHIBITION ON CERTAIN ADDITIVES IN FREE OR REDUCED-PRICE MEALS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school meal additives, not property tax exemptions.
